TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: pai timun a mareka nia vetjek a i Igiris, kaleva-i anan tua Tsemas.
S.PHON: pai timun a marəka nia vəcək a i igiris, kaɭəva-i anan tua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: pai timun a mareka nia vetjek a i Igiris, kaleva-i anan tua Cemas.
S.PHON: pai timun a marəka nia vəʦək a i igiris, kaɭəva-i anan tua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: Our brothers and sisters in England, let us continue to rejoice in God.

S.FORM: pai a Tsemas, a aɫak nimadju a kinaitaitan a ti Yisu-sama pasa maza i katsauanen sa tje paseqeɫingi anga, sa tje saneaɫaki anga a mapuɫat a i katsauan a tsautsau, sa tje paparevetjevetjeki anga a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: pai a ʦəmas, a aʎak nimaɉu a kinaitaitan a ti jisu-sama pasa maza i kaʦauanən sa cə pasəqəʎiŋi aŋa, sa cə sanəaʎaki aŋa a mapuʎat a i kaʦauan a ʦauʦau, sa cə paparəvəcəvəcəki aŋa a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: pai a Cemas, a aljak nimadju a kinaitaitan a ti Yisu-sama pasa maza i kacauanen sa tje paseqeljingi anga, sa tje sanealjaki anga a mapuljat a i kacauan a caucau, sa tje paparevetjevetjeki anga a mapuljat.
S.PHON: pai a ʦəmas, a aʎak nimaɉu a kinaitaitan a ti jisu-sama pasa maza i kaʦauanən sa ʦə pasəqəʎiŋi aŋa, sa ʦə sanəaʎaki aŋa a mapuʎat a i kaʦauan a ʦauʦau, sa ʦə paparəvəʦəvəʦəki aŋa a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: As for God he sent his only son Jesus here to the world, and we are saved, and all we human beings in the world are made his children, and we are all made brothers and sisters together.

S.FORM: maleva itjen aravats tua Tsemas.
S.PHON: maɭəva icən aravaʦ tua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: maleva itjen aravac tua Cemas.
S.PHON: maɭəva iʦən aravaʦ tua ʦəmas.

S.FORM: qau pai timun a nia kaka i Igiris tjaisangas mun a kemɫang tua kiɫivak nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau pai timun a nia kaka i igiris caisaŋas mun a kəmʎaŋ tua kiʎivak nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau pai timun a nia kaka i Igiris tjaisangas mun a kemljang tua kiljivak nua Cemas.
S.PHON: qau pai timun a nia kaka i igiris ʦaisaŋas mun a kəmʎaŋ tua kiʎivak nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: Now you our brothers and sisters in England you first knew of the love of God.

S.FORM: nu djaɫunen amen a kemasi tsadja ravats i kaledep a sema maza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: nu ɉaʎunən amən a kəmasi ʦaɉa ravaʦ i kaɭədəp a səma maza i tajuaŋ.
S.FORM: nu djaljunen amen a kemasi cadja ravac i kaledep a sema maza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: nu ɉaʎunən amən a kəmasi ʦaɉa ravaʦ i kaɭədəp a səma maza i tajuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: You came to us from far away in the west to here in Taiwan.

S.FORM: pai ka alu a puluq a tsaviɫ a tjaisangas imazanga mun a tjemautsiketsikel tjanuamen.
S.PHON: pai ka aɭu a puɭuq a ʦaviʎ a caisaŋas imazaŋa mun a cəmauʦikəʦikəɭ canuamən.
S.FORM: pai ka alu a puluq a cavilj a tjaisangas imazanga mun a tjemaucikecikel tjanuamen.
S.PHON: pai ka aɭu a puɭuq a ʦaviʎ a ʦaisaŋas imazaŋa mun a ʦəmauʦikəʦikəɭ ʦanuamən.
S.TRANSL: From 80 years ago you were here teaching us.

S.FORM: liaw anga aravats a kiukai imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ɭiaw aŋa aravaʦ a kiukai imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.FORM: liaw anga aravac a kiukai imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: ɭiaw aŋa aravaʦ a kiukai imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Now there are very many churches here in Taiwan.

S.FORM: pai tutsu a tsaviɫ ka kemasi sikatjeluɫ tjuruvu anga aravats a nalemingdjeɫ tsa su umaq ta su kinatsautsauan a Tsemas.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu a ʦaviʎ ka kəmasi sikacəɭuʎ curuvu aŋa aravaʦ a naɭəmiŋɉəʎ ʦa su umaq ta su kinaʦauʦauan a ʦəmas.
S.FORM: pai tucu a cavilj ka kemasi sikatjelulj tjuruvu anga aravac a nalemingdjelj ca su umaq ta su kinacaucauan a Cemas.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu a ʦaviʎ ka kəmasi sikaʦəɭuʎ ʦuruvu aŋa aravaʦ a naɭəmiŋɉəʎ ʦa su umaq ta su kinaʦauʦauan a ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: And now and in the last few years(?) very many people have built up your house your body, God.

S.FORM: pai aitsu tiamen a katsalisian kisusususu anga men a mapuɫat, natjeɫaving anga men tua nia sisalimsim tua mana nia pasalisaliw, malevaleva men aravats.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu tiamən a kaʦaɭisian kisusususu aŋa mən a mapuʎat, nacəʎaviŋ aŋa mən tua nia sisaɭimsim tua mana nia pasaɭisaɭiw, maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: pai aicu tiamen a kacalisian kisusususu anga men a mapuljat, natjeljaving anga men tua nia sisalimsim tua mana nia pasalisaliw, malevaleva men aravac.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu tiamən a kaʦaɭisian kisusususu aŋa mən a mapuʎat, naʦəʎaviŋ aŋa mən tua nia sisaɭimsim tua mana nia pasaɭisaɭiw, maɭəvaɭəva mən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: And now we people of the mountain slopes have all become believers, we have passed the time of misery because of our sins; and we are very glad.

S.FORM: pai aitsu tisun a Tsemas a napaseqeɫing tjanuamen, saka timun uta a mareka nia vetjek a se Igiris a napadjaɫun tjanuamen tua kai nua Tsemas, sa aya men a malevaleva.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu tisun a ʦəmas a napasəqəʎiŋ canuamən, saka timun uta a marəka nia vəcək a sə igiris a napaɉaʎun canuamən tua kai nua ʦəmas, sa aja mən a maɭəvaɭəva.
S.FORM: pai aicu tisun a Cemas a napaseqeljing tjanuamen, saka timun uta a mareka nia vetjek a se Igiris a napadjaljun tjanuamen tua kai nua Cemas, sa aya men a malevaleva.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu tisun a ʦəmas a napasəqəʎiŋ ʦanuamən, saka timun uta a marəka nia vəʦək a sə igiris a napaɉaʎun ʦanuamən tua kai nua ʦəmas, sa aja mən a maɭəvaɭəva.
S.TRANSL: We rejoice and say: You, God, have saved us, and you our brothers and sisters of England have brought to us the word of God.

S.FORM: pai ka sikatjeluɫ a tsaviɫ nu sekauɫan uta a ti Uaituun sinsi pasa maza i Tayuang, saka uri kitsaquan tua nia kai a katsalisian, sa uri katsalisiani anga su kai, maleva men uta aravats.
S.PHON: pai ka sikacəɭuʎ a ʦaviʎ nu səkauʎan uta a ti uaituun sinsi pasa maza i tajuaŋ, saka uri kiʦaquan tua nia kai a kaʦaɭisian, sa uri kaʦaɭisiani aŋa su kai, maɭəva mən uta aravaʦ.
S.FORM: pai ka sikatjelulj a cavilj nu sekauljan uta a ti Uaituun sinsi pasa maza i Tayuang, saka uri kicaquan tua nia kai a kacalisian, sa uri kacalisiani anga su kai, maleva men uta aravac.
S.PHON: pai ka sikaʦəɭuʎ a ʦaviʎ nu səkauʎan uta a ti uaituun sinsi pasa maza i tajuaŋ, saka uri kiʦaquan tua nia kai a kaʦaɭisian, sa uri kaʦaɭisiani aŋa su kai, maɭəva mən uta aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: Two years ago you also sent teacher Whitehorn here to Taiwan, to learn our mountain language and to put your word into mountain language; we are very glad.

S.FORM: pai tu kinaimazan kisamuɫamuɫa aravats a kematsalisianan tua nia sizengzenger tua Tsemas a senay.
S.PHON: pai tu kinaimazan kisamuʎamuʎa aravaʦ a kəmaʦaɭisianan tua nia sizəŋzəŋər tua ʦəmas a sənaj.
S.FORM: pai tu kinaimazan kisamuljamulja aravac a kemacalisianan tua nia sizengzenger tua Cemas a senay.
S.PHON: pai tu kinaimazan kisamuʎamuʎa aravaʦ a kəmaʦaɭisianan tua nia sizəŋzəŋər tua ʦəmas a sənaj.
S.TRANSL: During his time here he has worked hard to put into mountain language our songs of praise to God.

S.FORM: aitsu a nia, aitsu a kai uta nua Tsemas liaw anga uta a nia kinatsalisianan.
S.PHON: aiʦu a nia, aiʦu a kai uta nua ʦəmas ɭiaw aŋa uta a nia kinaʦaɭisianan.
S.FORM: aicu a nia, aicu a kai uta nua Cemas liaw anga uta a nia kinacalisianan.
S.PHON: aiʦu a nia, aiʦu a kai uta nua ʦəmas ɭiaw aŋa uta a nia kinaʦaɭisianan.
S.TRANSL: These our-the word of God too, we have put a lot into mountain language.

S.FORM: pai tutsu ɫemaluay anga men tua senay, ɫemaluay anga men tua kai nua Tsemas a pagaɫu.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu ʎəmaɭuaj aŋa mən tua sənaj, ʎəmaɭuaj aŋa mən tua kai nua ʦəmas a pagaʎu.
S.FORM: pai tucu ljemaluay anga men tua senay, ljemaluay anga men tua kai nua Cemas a pagalju.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu ʎəmaɭuaj aŋa mən tua sənaj, ʎəmaɭuaj aŋa mən tua kai nua ʦəmas a pagaʎu.
S.TRANSL: So now we understand the songs, we understand the word of God a little.

S.FORM: malevaleva men uta aravats.
S.PHON: maɭəvaɭəva mən uta aravaʦ.
S.FORM: malevaleva men uta aravac.
S.PHON: maɭəvaɭəva mən uta aravaʦ.

S.FORM: qau pai aitsu namatsadjatsadja itjen aravats a i Igiris a i maza, ɫakua tjara ita tja kininemneman, tjara kisamuɫamuɫa-i sakamaya, tjara kalevaleva-i sakamaya, tjara zengezengeri sakamaya tua Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu namaʦaɉaʦaɉa icən aravaʦ a i igiris a i maza, ʎakua cara ita ca kininəmnəman, cara kisamuʎamuʎa-i sakamaja, cara kaɭəvaɭəva-i sakamaja, cara zəŋəzəŋəri sakamaja tua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau pai aicu namacadjacadja itjen aravac a i Igiris a i maza, ljakua tjara ita tja kininemneman, tjara kisamuljamulja-i sakamaya, tjara kalevaleva-i sakamaya, tjara zengezengeri sakamaya tua Cemas.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu namaʦaɉaʦaɉa iʦən aravaʦ a i igiris a i maza, ʎakua ʦara ita ʦa kininəmnəman, ʦara kisamuʎamuʎa-i sakamaja, ʦara kaɭəvaɭəva-i sakamaja, ʦara zəŋəzəŋəri sakamaja tua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: And now we in England and here are very far apart, but certainly we are one in thought; so let us all work hard, let us all rejoice, let us all praise God.

S.FORM: qau pai aitsu tiamen a katsalisian imaza uri zemenger amen, uri malevanan amen, uri semukub amen tua Tsemas a palangda tjanumun a nia kaka i Igiris a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu tiamən a kaʦaɭisian imaza uri zəməŋər amən, uri maɭəvanan amən, uri səmukub amən tua ʦəmas a paɭaŋda canumun a nia kaka i igiris a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: qau pai aicu tiamen a kacalisian imaza uri zemenger amen, uri malevanan amen, uri semukub amen tua Cemas a palangda tjanumun a nia kaka i Igiris a mapuljat.
S.PHON: qau pai aiʦu tiamən a kaʦaɭisian imaza uri zəməŋər amən, uri maɭəvanan amən, uri səmukub amən tua ʦəmas a paɭaŋda ʦanumun a nia kaka i igiris a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: And now we mountain people here are going to praise, to rejoice, to worship God, for all you our brothers and sisters in England to hear.
